leadText: A Dark Tera Shard (Japanese: テラピースあく Tera Piece Evil) is a type of item introduced in Generation IX. It is a type of Tera Shard, which can be used to change the Tera Type of a Pokémon. It corresponds to the Dark type.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] 50 Dark Tera Shards can be used to change a Pokémon's Tera Type to Dark at the Treasure Eatery in Medali , except for Ogerpon and Terapagos .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Area Zero , Glaseado Mountain Academy Ace Tournament Tera Raid Battles (3★ onwards) S V TM Ogre Oustin' S V ID Area Zero Underdepths , Canyon Biome , Coastal Biome , Polar Biome , Savanna Biome Item Printer Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S V Pokémon Stamp Rally 2024 Tera Shards All July 12 to October 31, 2024 PJCS 2025 Participation Tera Shards All June 21 to September 30, 2025

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V ZA On rare occasions, these shards form when a Tera Pokémon falls in battle and its Tera Jewel shatters.
